title: São José dos Campos, SP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to São José dos Campos, SP: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

São José dos Campos is a city in SP with a population of 737,310. A major aerospace and technology hub in São Paulo state, home to Embraer and INPE, surrounded by the Serra da Mantiqueira mountains.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
